name: Overnight Run Report

---

## Summary

How did the run go overall? (Great / Mostly good / Mixed / Failed)

## Setup

- **Platform:** Claude Code / Codex / Other
- **Project type:** Node / Python / Go / Rust / Other
- **Session length:** (how many hours)
- **Batches planned:** (N)
- **Batches completed:** (N)

## What worked well

What went right? What surprised you positively?

## What went wrong

Any failures, unexpected behavior, or things you had to fix manually after the run?

## What you changed in your setup afterward

Did you update your survival guide template, add new non-negotiables, change batch sizing, fix a flaky test? This is the most valuable part — it helps everyone improve their setup.

## Tips for others

Anything you wish you'd known before your first overnight run.
